title: tarenna calycina
intro: Tarenna calycina, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is a type of evergreen shrub native to tropical regions. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Tarenna calycina include its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Tarenna calycina can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
